Job advert

We are looking for a compassionate, dedicated professional to join our team. You will work as part of a multidisciplinary team providing high quality care to patients, supporting them and their families throughout their treatment. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone looking to develop their career within a supportive and forward-thinking NHS organisation.

Requirements

  • NMC registration (where applicable to role)
  • Enhanced DBS check
  • Evidence of continuing professional development

Benefits

  • NHS Pension Scheme
  • 27 days annual leave plus bank holidays, rising with service
  • Access to NHS discounts and Blue Light Card
Visit employer website
